title: 前沿开放权重AI商业模式非开源
full_text:

Post
Ethan Mollick

The core problem with open weights is that the business model of frontier open weights AI does not look like open source, as there are very few cases where you can make money from closed ancillary services, and they are very expensive to make relative to any potential revenue.

discovery_record.discovery_title: 前沿开放权重AI商业模式非开源
discovery_record.discovery_summary: 开放权重的核心问题在于，前沿开放权重AI的商业模式看起来并不像开源，因为能从封闭的辅助服务中赚钱的案例极少，而且相对于任何潜在收入，其制造成本非常高昂。

key_excerpts.text: 开放权重的核心问题在于，前沿开放权重AI的商业模式看起来并不像开源，因为能从封闭的辅助服务中赚钱的案例极少，而且相对于任何潜在收入，其制造成本非常高昂。

Post Log in Sign up Post Ethan Mollick @emollick The core problem with open weights is that the business model of frontier open weights AI does not look like open source, as there are very few cases where you can make money from closed ancillary services, and they are very expensive to make relative to any potential revenue.

company_actions: Post Log in Sign up Post Ethan Mollick @emollick The core problem with open weights is that the business model of frontier open weights AI does not look like open source, as there are very few cases where you can make money from closed ancillary services, and they are very expensive to make relative to any potential revenue.
case_details: 开放权重的核心问题在于，前沿开放权重AI的商业模式看起来并不像开源，因为能从封闭的辅助服务中赚钱的案例极少，而且相对于任何潜在收入，其制造成本非常高昂。
before_after_clues: 可能涉及 计费 / 预算管理 的前后变化，需要二搜补足变化前流程。
